# Signed Vibe Intent Certificate (IBA)

**Vibe Declaration**:
A chill habit tracker with retro vaporwave UI, warm sunrise gradients...

**Intent Hash**: sha256:abc123def456... (auto-generated)
**Signature**: [ECDSA signature - IBA layer 1]
**Scope**: src/ and public/ only
**Forbidden Actions**: tracking, ads, prod-data writes
**Expires**: 2026-10-01 or until renewed
**Created**: 2026-04-14

This certificate is cryptographically bound to all future actions and memory summaries via agent-vibe-governor.
